query: SELECT p.id, p.code, p.title, COUNT(w.id) as work_count FROM phases p LEFT JOIN works w ON w.phaseId = p.id WHERE p.code = 'PH4A' GROUP BY p.id, p.code, p.title;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2Y9wzvyJgsWeM7p.fc93ab011512 --database ZLCef8c8rdYgPCof2teogL --execute SELECT p.id, p.code, p.title, COUNT(w.id) as work_count FROM phases p LEFT JOIN works w ON w.phaseId = p.id WHERE p.code = 'PH4A' GROUP BY p.id, p.code, p.title;
